title: Add Risk System validation tooling
description: Follow-on to TASK-111 from Guidelines/MAP_repo_systems_gap_review.md: after the Risk System docs/template exist and the current validator run_tests changes are approved, add focused validation tooling and tests that check Risk Register template/artifact structure without owning the prose system specification.
acceptance_criteria: Risk validator checks the required Risk Register template/artifact structure defined by TASK-111 without owning the prose system specification
Focused tests cover passing and failing risk register cases
MAP_System/scripts/run_tests.sh includes the focused validator/test and the relevant validation commands pass
